properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret loaded from the environment.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed frontend origins.

properties.name: app.otp.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum OTP verification attempts before invalidation.

properties.name: app.otp.request-limit.max-requests
properties.description: Maximum OTP generation requests allowed within the configured time window.

properties.name: app.otp.request-limit.window-minutes
properties.description: Time window in minutes used for OTP request throttling.

properties.name: app.login.rate-limit.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum failed login attempts allowed before temporary blocking.

properties.name: app.login.rate-limit.window-minutes
properties.description: Time window in minutes used for login rate limiting.

properties.name: app.captcha.expiration-minutes
properties.description: Time window in minutes before generated image captchas expire.

properties.name: app.mail.from
properties.description: From address used for OTP emails.
